message.content:
This section provides retrieval-oriented data on Southeast Asian mobile game advertising trends for 2025. It answers questions regarding:
- **Topics & Metrics:** Market scale and YoY growth (advertisers: 68K, +52%; unique creatives: 11.7M, +69%); creative format distribution (video: 77.7%); monthly advertiser counts and active creative volumes with corresponding new material ratios; OS/platform shares (79%, 77%).
- **Entities:** Top ad-placing titles (Kingshot, Mafia City, Logicus, Fate War, Legend of YMIR, Water Match); data provider (广大大); comparative regional entity (Middle East games).
- **Dates:** Full reporting period Jan–Dec 2025; specific peak campaign months for Middle East titles (May, June).
- **Claims:** Middle East game ad campaigns peak in May/June, rely heavily on recycled classic creatives, exhibit slow iteration cycles, and consistently maintain a monthly new creative ratio below 40%.
- **Figures & Evidence Types:** Two monthly trend charts (Jan–Dec 2025) visualizing advertiser volume vs. new advertiser ratio, and active creative volume vs. new creative ratio. Evidence is quantitative platform data sourced from the 广大大 Advertiser Analysis Module.
- **Definitions/Procedures:** None explicitly defined or outlined.

- **Topics & Metrics:** Market scale and YoY growth (advertisers: 68K, +52%; unique creatives: 11.7M, +69%); creative format distribution (video: 77.7%); monthly advertiser counts and active creative volumes with corresponding new material ratios; OS/platform shares (79%, 77%).
- **Entities:** Top ad-placing titles (Kingshot, Mafia City, Logicus, Fate War, Legend of YMIR, Water Match); data provider (广大大); comparative regional entity (Middle East games).
- **Dates:** Full reporting period Jan–Dec 2025; specific peak campaign months for Middle East titles (May, June).
- **Claims:** Middle East game ad campaigns peak in May/June, rely heavily on recycled classic creatives, exhibit slow iteration cycles, and consistently maintain a monthly new creative ratio below 40%.
- **Figures & Evidence Types:** Two monthly trend charts (Jan–Dec 2025) visualizing advertiser volume vs. new advertiser ratio, and active creative volume vs. new creative ratio. Evidence is quantitative platform data sourced from the 广大大 Advertiser Analysis Module.
- **Definitions/Procedures:** None explicitly defined or outlined.
